items.title: LaMelo Trade, Kawhi Rumors, Beef Stew Trade, Austin Reaves Contract & more | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: The Wolves are trading Naz Reid and every last draft pick they could for LaMelo Ball. Could Kawhi return to his previous teams? Isaiah Stewart also got traded and Austin Reaves got a max contract. We’ll discuss that and where the Grizzlies and Lakers could go from here. You can…

items.title: 2026 NBA Draft Superlatives
items.body_excerpt: The dust has settled on the 2026 NBA Draft, after a two-day affair that saw plenty of chalk followed by plenty of surprises. From freshman phenoms to super-senior surprises and everything in between, this draft had everything—and given the ever-evolving NCAA landscape, this…

items.title: The madman of Minnesota
items.body_excerpt: The Timberwolves are never boring and never at rest under Tim Connelly.
